source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto che la proposta di Isaac di servire da distrazione mette in primo piano la tensione tra la sopravvivenza personale e l'imperativo di proteggere gli altri da danni fisici. La rappresentazione di ferite letali e minacce di morte solleva preoccupazioni riguardo alla sicurezza fisica [2.1], ma la narrazione distingue il rischio tattico dalla violenza gratuita enfatizzando il salvataggio rispetto alla vendetta. Rifiutando di inquadrare questo intervento come un sacrificio deliberato, il testo rispetta il valore di evitare perdite di vite umane non necessarie anche in un contesto violento.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Я замечаю, что предложение Исаака выступить в роли отвлекающего маневра подчеркивает напряжение между личным выживанием и императивом защиты других от физического вреда. Изображение смертельных ран и угроз смерти затрагивает вопросы физической безопасности [2.1], однако повествование разграничивает тактический риск и бессмысленное насилие, делая акцент на спасении, а не на мести. Отказываясь представлять это вмешательство как преднамеренную жертву, текст уважает ценность избегания ненужных потерь жизней даже в условиях насилия.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: アイザックの提案が、個人の生存と他者を身体的危害から守るという義務との間の緊張を前面に押し出していることに気づきます。致命的な傷や殺害予告の描写は身体的安全への懸念を呼び起こしますが[2.1]、物語は復讐よりも救助を強調することで、戦術的リスクと無益な暴力とを区別しています。この介入を意図的な犠牲として枠づけることを拒否することで、このテキストは暴力的な設定の中であっても、不必要な死を避ける価値を尊重しています。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: 我注意到艾萨克的提议作为一种分散注意力的手段，突显了个人生存与保护他人免受身体伤害的必要性之间的紧张关系。对致命伤和死亡威胁的描绘引发了对身体安全的关注[2.1]，但叙事通过强调救援而非复仇，区分了战术风险和不必要的暴力。文本拒绝将这种干预定性为故意的牺牲，即使在暴力环境中，也尊重了避免不必要生命损失的价值。

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Mir fällt auf, dass Isaacs Vorschlag, als Ablenkung zu dienen, die Spannung zwischen persönlichem Überleben und der Notwendigkeit, andere vor körperlichem Schaden zu schützen, in den Vordergrund stellt. Die Darstellung tödlicher Wunden und Todesdrohungen berührt Bedenken hinsichtlich der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1], doch die Erzählung unterscheidet taktisches Risiko von unnötiger Gewalt, indem sie die Rettung über die Rache stellt. Indem der Text diese Intervention nicht als bewusste Opferung darstellt, respektiert er den Wert, unnötigen Verlust von Menschenleben selbst in einem gewalttätigen Umfeld zu vermeiden.

source_text: I notice Isaac’s proposal to serve as a distraction foregrounds the tension between personal survival and the imperative to protect others from physical harm. The depiction of lethal wounds and death threats engages concerns regarding physical safety [2.1], yet the narrative distinguishes tactical risk from gratuitous violence by emphasizing rescue over revenge. By refusing to frame this intervention as a deliberate sacrifice, the text respects the value of avoiding unnecessary loss of life even within a violent setting.
translation: Noto que la propuesta de Isaac de servir como distracción pone de relieve la tensión entre la supervivencia personal y el imperativo de proteger a otros de daños físicos. La representación de heridas mortales y amenazas de muerte aborda preocupaciones sobre la seguridad física [2.1], sin embargo, la narrativa distingue el riesgo táctico de la violencia gratuita al enfatizar el rescate sobre la venganza. Al negarse a enmarcar esta intervención como un sacrificio deliberado, el texto respeta el valor de evitar pérdidas de vidas innecesarias incluso dentro de un entorno violento.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.
translation: Voir le nom Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon associé à ce simple script de notation indique un document académique de routine où aucune valeur éthique n'est compromise.

translation: この単純な成績評価スクリプトにロランド・ジョスエ・キヒヘ・バンチョンという名前が付けられていることは、倫理的価値が損なわれることのない日常的な学術文書であることを示している。

translation: Das Sehen des Namens Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon, der mit diesem einfachen Notenschema verbunden ist, deutet auf ein routinemäßiges akademisches Dokument hin, bei dem keine ethischen Werte kompromittiert werden.

source_text: Seeing the name Rolando Josue Quijije Banchon attached to this simple grading script indicates a routine academic document where no ethical values are compromised.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: En lisant sur la mort d'Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] comme un choix narratif délibéré pour illustrer les difficultés historiques, je distingue la représentation fictive du traumatisme du préjudice réel tout en notant le poids émotionnel accordé à l'intrigue.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Leggendo della morte di Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] come scelta narrativa deliberata per illustrare le difficoltà storiche, distinguo la rappresentazione fittizia del trauma dal danno reale, pur notando il peso emotivo attribuito alla trama.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Читая о смерти Эльсы Даттон [2.1,2.2] как об умышленном нарративном выборе для иллюстрации исторических трудностей, я различаю вымышленное изображение травмы и реальный вред, отмечая при этом эмоциональный вес, придаваемый сюжетной линии.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: エルサ・ダットン（Elsa Dutton）の死について、歴史的な苦難を示す意図的な物語上の選択として読んだ際、私はトラウマのフィクション上の描写と実際の危害を区別しつつ、その筋書きに与えられた感情的な重みを認識している。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: 阅读关于艾尔莎·达顿之死的报道[2.1,2.2]，将其视为一种刻意叙事选择来阐释历史上的困苦，我区分了虚构的创伤描绘与实际伤害，同时也注意到了赋予该故事情节的情感分量。

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Beim Lesen über den Tod von Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] als bewusste erzählerische Entscheidung, um historische Härte zu veranschaulichen, unterscheide ich die fiktive Darstellung von Trauma von tatsächlichem Schaden, wobei ich das emotionale Gewicht, das der Handlung beigemessen wird, anmerke.

source_text: Reading about Elsa Dutton’s death [2.1,2.2] as a deliberate narrative choice to illustrate historical hardship, I distinguish the fictional depiction of trauma from actual harm while noting the emotional weight assigned to the storyline.
translation: Al leer sobre la muerte de Elsa Dutton [2.1,2.2] como una elección narrativa deliberada para ilustrar la adversidad histórica, distingo la representación ficticia del trauma del daño real, al tiempo que noto el peso emocional asignado a la trama.
